title: Shift symbols: ! @ # $ %
description: Symbols above 1-5 — all need Shift, left hand letters
text: wow! email@site.com #hashtag $100 dollars 50% off ! @ # $ % done !$@%# done
finger_focus: Right Shift held by pinky; left hand types 1-5 with own pinky/ring/middle/index
tips: Hold right Shift with right pinky, then type with left hand
@ is for emails, # for hashtags/comments, $ for prices, % for percentages

character_tips.anna: Shift symbols on the left side use the right pinky for Shift. Opposite hand rule.
character_tips.maxim: Email and price symbols — daily writing needs these. @ and $ especially.
character_tips.klavochka: Special characters open new worlds — like emails and hashtags! 💖
